Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear Counsel,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a short extension of our contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete our review thoroughly and return thoughtful comments, which I believe will benefit both sides and help move the matter forward efficiently.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this adjustment works on your end, or if you would prefer to discuss an alternative timeframe. Thank you for your consideration, and I appreciate your continued cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Request for Brief Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear Counsel,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a short extension of our contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete our review thoroughly and return thoughtful comments, which I believe will benefit both sides and help move the matter forward efficiently.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this adjustment works on your end, or if you would prefer to discuss an alternative timeframe. Thank you for your consideration, and I appreciate your continued cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
